message:
feat: implement encode_stream_events for streaming JSON event generation

Add encode_stream_events function that walks a JsonValue tree and emits
JsonStreamEvent items, complementing the existing decode_stream_sync.
The function normalizes input, applies optional replacers, and correctly
marks keys requiring quoting via the was_quoted field.

Includes 5 unit tests covering primitives, objects, arrays, quoted keys,
and roundtrip compatibility with decode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The format specification is maintained at [toon-format/spec](https://github.com/toon-format/spec).
